Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x068D "INTERNATIONALRUGBYSIMULATOR-CD00-068D" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $cd00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "International Rugby Simulator.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $CD00 to set the TOD values ($DC08-$DC0B) and the CIA#1 Timer B value ($DC0F) to allow the game to run correctly.
The memory between $CC00-$CFFF contained an unecessary repeating memory block. Therefore this range was zeroed out.
